creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 195953
update diff

The port is heavily based on java/netbeans.

The new version only works with JDK9, so I thought it would be better to have it in the -devel port.
More information of the new release here:

https://netbeans.apache.org/download/nb90/index.html

(Actually it supposed to be able to use some plugin with JDK8 but it didn't work for me).
